name: HLK Biotech Holding Group, Inc.
summary: HLK Biotech Holding Group, Inc., through its subsidiaries, produces and sells biodiesel. It also acquires real estate properties. The company was formerly known as Amelot Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to HLK Biotech Holding Group, Inc. in February 2018. HLK Biotech Holding Group, Inc. is headquartered in Norfolk, Virginia.
